changelog: Channels no longer stop after one item: the schedule now follows continuously from item to item (Jellyfin swaps media in place without a view change, which the previous watcher missed). The TV home-screen row is placed in the normal sections flow, removing the large gap above it. Fixes a tuned-state leak when leaving the channel after an in-place advance.
description: Lightweight virtual TV channels: deterministic schedules over your own library, tuned in via normal direct playback at the live position. No transcoding, no tuner emulation.
name: LiteTV Channels
overview: TV channels from your library, without transcoding.
